raw_consumer_statement:
I am submitting a complaint regarding XXXX XXXX ( XXXX ). On XX/XX/year>, I paid {$590.00} for a pre-sale order of their upcoming XXXX XXXX machine, which they advertised would be released by the end of XXXX. At the time of purchase, XXXX clearly stated that customers could cancel at any point prior to delivery for a full refund. 
Since then, the company has stopped communicating entirely and has ignored my requests to cancel and receive my refund. Numerous other customers have reported the same issue on XXXX and other online forums. 
There is growing concern that the company may be insolvent and retaining customer funds without fulfilling orders. I simply want my {$590.00} deposit returned. Unfortunately, because the charge was made more than a year ago, my credit card provider ( Citi ) is unable to process a dispute.

I am requesting assistance in obtaining a refund from XXXX, as they are not honoring their commitments or responding to customers.
